name: UEX Corporation
description: UEX Corporation is a Canada-based uranium and cobalt exploration and development company. The company is primarily engaged in the acquisition, exploration, and evaluation of mineral properties located in the Athabasca Basin of northern Saskatchewan, Canada. Since its founding in 2002, UEX has focused on advancing the discovery and development of uranium and cobalt deposits within this resource-rich region. Headquartered in Saskatoon, Saskatchewan, the company operates as a public entity dedicated to identifying and developing high-potential mineral assets to support the evolving global energy and industrial sectors.
